name: Montego Bags O' Wags Dog Treats Mini Bones - 120g
description: Montego BAGS O’ WAGS Assortment o' Mini Bones are deliciously chewy treats made with high-quality ingredients, perfect for adult dogs who deserve something extra special. Whether used as a daily reward, training treat, or a between-meal snack, these bars are sure to satisfy. Montego Bags O’ Wags Mini Bones are chewable, bite-sized treats designed for daily use . They’re ideal as a reward for good behaviour , an incentive during training , or a tasty snack between meals. Formulated to complement any Montego Pet Nutrition dry or wet food diet, these treats are suitable for dogs of all breeds and life stages Key Benefits Highly palatable and irresistible to most dogs. Easy to chew and digest , suitable for all breeds and sizes. Supports training as a positive reinforcement reward. Promotes dental health and satisfies natural chewing instincts. Convenient packaging for storage and freshness. Ingredients Corn starch, chicken meal, water, glycerine, propylene glycol, sugars, chicken fat, wheat gluten, sodium phosphates, fish oil, carrageenan. ADDITIVES (/kg): SENSORY: Palatability meat-based enhancers with beef aroma, red colourant; PRESERVATIVES: Potassium sorbate.‎ Free from: artificial sugars, soy, eggs, dairy, and meat-based fillers. Nutritional Information Nutrient Amount Crude Protein 20% Total Fat 5% Crude Fibre 1% Moisture 18.5% Calcium 1% Phosphorus 0.8% Sugars 3% Metabolizable Energy 330kcal/100 g These treats are intended as a snack and not a complete diet. Always provide fresh water.
